posts.text:
😉


Dennis Michels (@lonecavalryman)

Also TY for having a sense of humor as I intended.



— https://nitter.net/lonecavalryman/status/2034782458189947237#m

Nope it’s me.  Thanks


farmer Todd 🐄🐐🐖🐑🦙🐓 (@ToddEccles)

Bret you are always quick-witted with your responses, unless its your Social Media manager 😂



— https://nitter.net/ToddEccles/status/2034783929048190986#m

Either that or the end of Spring Break for our kids.  But thanks for watching.


Dennis Michels (@lonecavalryman)

I’m genuinely shocked that @BretBaier and @JesseBWatters are having an affair! It’s the only possible explanation for them being off @FoxNews at the same time 🤷



— https://nitter.net/lonecavalryman/status/2034772805452275850#m

Verne Lundquist.


Doug Pearl (@PearlDoug73611)

“Yes Sir”!  Who said that Jack Nicklaus sunk a birdie putt on the 17th hole at the 1986 Masters?



— https://nitter.net/PearlDoug73611/status/2034661132116353529#m

This is just plain awesome!


Kyle Porter (@KylePorterNS)

Oh wow, the Masters launched a search function where you can find video of any shot hit from 1968-2025. 😳











— https://nitter.net/KylePorterNS/status/2034636118721794425#m

Yep kicks in this time every year.  Hope to shake it soon.


Greg Mercer (@mercerboy)

It must be allergy season... @BretBaier Is losing his voice again! Hope it's not too bad for you this year.



— https://nitter.net/mercerboy/status/2034404989037105575#m
Tonight I looked at fusion and how it’s grown as a power source and what that could mean for your future on #specialreport
Brit Hume shares hit thoughts on the conflict in Iran after the resignation of Joe Kent the former Director of the National Counterterrorism Center #specialreport

Lots happens behind the scenes, and I had a great time interviewing Senate Majority Leader John Thune. Be sure to catch my interview on @Fox News ! #Interview #Senate #JohnThune #Politics #BehindTheScenes
Here are some behind the scenes clips from my exclusive interview with Senate Majority Leader John Thune  #behindthescene #bts #interviews
Replying to @goodgrief1991  Thank you all for sending in your questions have a great Saint Patrick’s Day #tiktoktuesday
It’s TikTok Tuesday be sure to send in your questions in the comments or stitch this video with a video of yourself and your question and happy Saint Patrick’s Day 🍀
I had a great time interviewing Irish Prime Minister (Taoiseach) Micheál Martin on #specialreport
Be sure to tune in to #SpecialReport tomorrow for an exclusive interview with Senator John Thune at 6PM ET on @Fox News
Our panel last night broke down their thoughts on the DHS stalled funding and the effects it’s having on TSA #specialreport #tsa
Mt. Kilauea has erupted for the 43rd time since December 2024 #news #hawaii
